summary: Comprehensive testing of JT-Zero robotics runtime Phase 11 with critical bug fixes. All 43 backend tests pass (100%). CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: vo_dx/vo_dy values now non-zero when features tracked. All 8 threads running (T7_API newly added). Frontend fully operational with real-time updates.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer shows brief 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings during initial render - cosmetic only, charts work correctly

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns mode=native, native=true, build_info with GCC 12.2, cpp_standard=201703, platform=aarch64
GET /api/camera returns NON-ZERO vo_dx/vo_dy when features tracked (CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED) - e.g. vo_dx=-8.01e-05, vo_dy=-8.07e-05
GET /api/threads returns 8 threads all running: T0_Supervisor, T1_Sensors, T2_Events, T3_Reflex, T4_Rules, T5_MAVLink, T6_Camera, T7_API (newly added)
GET /api/state returns complete drone state with flight_mode=IDLE, roll/pitch/yaw, altitude_agl, all sensors (imu, baro, gps, rangefinder, optical_flow)
GET /api/events returns array with timestamp, type, priority, message fields
GET /api/mavlink returns state=CONNECTED, messages_sent=3000+, messages_received=100+, fc_autopilot=ArduPilot, vision_pos_sent counters
GET /api/performance returns total_cpu_percent=1.1%, memory=0.65MB, 8 thread stats, zero dropped events
GET /api/simulator/config returns wind_speed, wind_direction, sensor_noise, battery_drain, gravity, mass_kg, drag_coeff, turbulence
POST /api/simulator/config successfully updates config (tested wind_speed update)
WebSocket /api/ws/telemetry streams data at 10Hz (verified via frontend updates)
Frontend loads all 10 panels: 3D View, Drone Telemetry, Sensors, Camera/VO, MAVLink, Performance, Events, Commands, Simulator, Runtime Info
Frontend shows C++ Native badge in header
Frontend shows LINK status indicator and real-time heartbeat
Frontend data updates in real-time (uptime counter verified increasing)
Frontend Runtime panel shows C++ NATIVE mode, 8/8 threads, MAVLINK CONNECTED
Camera/VO panel displays FPS=15.0, frame count, features tracked, VO delta values
No JavaScript console errors in frontend
critical_code_review_comments: All 43 pytest backend tests pass - comprehensive API coverage including new VO displacement and thread count tests
CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: vo_dx/vo_dy now return real pixel-to-meter flow calculations when features are tracked
All 8 threads running correctly (T7_API newly added for API handling)
Native C++ runtime (jtzero_native.so via pybind11) fully operational
Performance metrics excellent: CPU <2%, Memory <1MB, zero dropped events
WebSocket streaming at 10Hz with full telemetry payload

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All panels visible and functional, real-time updates working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Uses C++ native runtime simulated sensor data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 11 bug fixes verified: 1) VO displacement now computes real non-zero values when features tracked (was always 0 before). 2) All 8 threads running including new T7_API. 3) Native C++ runtime operational. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_jtzero_api.py covers all REST endpoints including new tests for VO displacement and thread count. Minor recharts console warnings during initial render are cosmetic only.

vo_displacement_bug.after: vo_dx/vo_dy return real values like -8.01e-05 when features are tracked
vo_displacement_bug.verification_method: Multiple curl calls to /api/camera confirmed non-zero values
